endpoints.name: Inspection Recommendation
endpoints.description: Given an activity name or description, returns hazard data. Checks DB cache first (hybrid vector + trigram search), falls back to LLM generation and saves result for future use.

response_example.moc_ppe: Engineering controls (ventilation), Welding helmet with face shield, gloves, flame-resistant clothing
response_example.remarks: Ensure proper ventilation and use of PPE to prevent exposure to hazardous fumes and radiation.

response_fields.severity_likelihood: string — one of: 'High x Likely', 'High x Unlikely', 'Medium x Likely', 'Medium x Unlikely', 'Low x Likely', 'Low x Unlikely'
response_fields.moc_ppe: string — control measure and required PPE
response_fields.from_db: boolean — true = retrieved from DB cache, false = LLM-generated

endpoints.name: Quiz Generation
endpoints.description: Generates 5 multiple-choice quiz questions from completed inspection data.

request_example.hazard_type: Arc Flash / UV Radiation, Fume Inhalation, Fire and Explosion, Electric Shock
request_example.moc_ppe: Engineering controls (ventilation), Welding helmet with face shield, gloves, flame-resistant clothing
request_example.remarks: Ensure proper ventilation and use of PPE to prevent exposure to hazardous fumes and radiation.

questions.question: Which PPE is most critical when performing welding tasks?
options: B) Welding helmet with face shield

endpoints.name: WSH Risk Assessment Chatbot
endpoints.description: Stateless chatbot. Frontend owns full conversation history and sends it on every request. Returns structured risk assessment table in Markdown.

body.history: array of prior turn objects (can be empty on first turn)

request_example.message: Provide a risk assessment for confined space entry.

response_example.reply:
## Risk Assessment — Confined Space Entry

| # | Activity | Hazard | ... |
|---|----------|--------|-----|
...

response_fields.reply: string — full Markdown response including RA table, risk matrix, references

history_format.description: Each prior turn is an object with role and content

example.content: What are the risks of confined space entry?
